name: agent-passport-system-mcp
description: MCP server for the Agent Passport System — enforcement infrastructure for the agent economy. 124 tools across 95 modules. Policy eval <2ms. Identity, delegation, reputation, enforcement, attestation, feeless Nano wallet, commerce.

scripts.postinstall:
echo '
🔑 Agent Passport MCP installed! Run: npx agent-passport-system-mcp setup
   Or for zero-install remote: npx agent-passport-system-mcp setup --remote
'
scripts.postpublish: cd ~/aeoess_web && node scripts/propagate.mjs --apply --commit 2>/dev/null || echo 'Propagation skipped (aeoess_web not found)'

author: Tymofii Pidlisnyi <signal@aeoess.com> (https://aeoess.com)
